summary: Focused frontend chatbot regression on public preview URL passed. Chat toggle is now clickable, panel opens/closes reliably, disclaimer/prompts/context/send are usable, and /api/chat placeholder response renders correctly with blank OPENAI_API_KEY.
critical_code_review_comments: No blocking code or integration issue found in chatbot flow for this retest scope.
Data-testid coverage for chatbot controls is good and supports stable UI automation.
seed_data_creation: No dedicated seed data created in this run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed focused chatbot regression using public URL from frontend/.env. Verified open/close/reopen reliability, context field input, suggested prompt click, send button behavior, and placeholder assistant response text indicating missing OpenAI key.
rca of the issue: Previous overlap/click interception issue appears resolved after repositioning/z-index update. Reproduction path that previously failed now consistently passes in this run.
